name: Yasopp
description:
__Height:__ 183 cm (6'0")
__Blood Type:__ S
__Affiliations:__ Red Hair Pirates
__Position:__ Sniper

Acting as the sniper of the Red Hair Pirate Crew, Yasopp is a gifted sharp-shooter said to be capable of shooting the legs off an ant at 100 feet without harming the rest of it. He is the father of [Usopp](https://anilist.co/character/724) and was one of [Luffy's](https://anilist.co/character/40/Luffy-Monkey) favorite members of the Red Hair Pirates.
